title: Add contact phone number to the site

requirements.text: Display the phone number 8130422230 as a clickable contact link (tel:8130422230) in the site footer, alongside the existing brand info section.

quotes: add my phone no. phone no . 8130422230

acceptanceCriteria: The phone number 8130422230 is visible in the footer.
The phone number is rendered as a clickable `tel:` link.
Tapping the link on mobile initiates a phone call to 8130422230.
The styling is consistent with the existing footer design.

nonGoals: Adding the phone number to the header or any page other than the footer.
